feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot create outbound deliveries with same shipping point - vl037
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have created KE orders with 2 item lines, which all item have same shipping points. But when I tries to create outbound deliveries VL037 error message pops up.

I cannot revise shipping points in VA02, and also I parted outbound deliveries in VL01N but same error happens.

Need your help to fix it...

entry.title: F-32 clear customer: Error- Enter the Item number
entry.content:
Hi Experts, our user getting error " Enter the Item number" while customer clearing with F-32. 

Could you please support? Thank you a lot in advance. 
Please find the printscrens of the attempt:

entry.title: How to clear multiple vendor invoices received as partial invoices for single downpayment.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have one single downpayment with TDS, now this downpayment is supposed to be cleared with mutiple invoices recieved but I can see in F-54 I can choose only one invoice, is there any way to do this for multiple invoices in case I recieve partial invoices?

entry.title: How to desactivate ( not delete) a storage location in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

How can we desactivate a storage location in SAP ECC without deleting it via OX09 ?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: atom Mapping in DMEEX doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have problem to use atom mapping in DMEEX. Although the atom condition is true, the value is taken over into the node. in my case I exepect the nodde <cd> is replaced by the atom "BKTR".  

in the trace I can see the condition of BKTR is true, however the node still get another value. 

do your guy have idea what is wrong?

Thanks

Lan

entry.title: SAP LOGON OPTION TO CHNAGE LANGAUGUE SETTING
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

Kindly suggest me as i am unable to see option of SAP Logon in system to change language.How to setup that option.as i tried o change from system setting user data languague still it is not working .

 

i could not find any sap logon field to change language

entry.title: Choose a SAP module or stick with S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi all,

I hope you're all doing great.

I have an IT degree and 15 yrs of experience in QA/Testing. I'm thinking about transitioning to SAP and would love to know which module would suit my career goals best. I should admit that coding isn't my strong suit, but I do have a good understanding on databases and ETL processes.

I had some training in S/4 HANA in the past, however it did not align with my career aspirations, leading me to continue in the testing domain. I sense that I am at a crossroads and believe it is time for a change.

Any suggestions on which functional SAP module that fits my skills? And if I continue to focus on S/4 HANA, will that be sufficient to secure a job without prior knowledge of other SAP modules? 

Thanks in advance.

Cheers, RG!

entry.title: Combined orders - Conponentes consumption
entry.content:
Hello 

My customer has the need to combine several orders in the process because it leverages the equipment capacity making it possible to use the same capacity to produce several different products.

However, as the output products are different, hte BOM of each of the orders in the combination differ as well and I am concerned about the settlement since the combined order distributes the components costs in all orders according to the distribution rate. For example, I may add a very expensive component to a material whose BOM is 10x cheaper than that.

So my requirement is to consume components individually in the original orders (261), although posting goods recepit simmultaneously (101). I tried in CO11n and I can't reach each order individually.

Any thoughts?

entry.title: MRP Date
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to run MRP in running system but I am facing a problem. The problem is that when I will launch MRP it will calculates all the previous data but I want to calculate the data from current date. for ex:- my clint work on SAP from 2021 but i want to MRP live form Nov 2024, how to do? If there is any provision please tell. 

If any customization options pl let me now.

Thanks, 

Varshesh

entry.title: Gold pokket- LOAN- APP-CUSTOMER-care-helpline–NUMBER +91)08585057116\_/7268937135Call dhdh
entry.content: Jobs the same time zone as NYC to you

entry.title: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM- ERROR WHILE GENERATING OR UPDATING DELIVERY
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

I am currently facing issue with regarding with VAS KIT to stock, as per the below screenshot- Document not created and error while creating or updating the delivery. 

I have configured WPT for KTSI and I have assinged the document type to WPT, 

I have created the VAS Bin and assinged the bin to VAS work center

2 packspec created one with KITS pack grp and the other one with my Packspec 

also updated VAS relevance for KITS. 

Could you please help what I may be missing still?

entry.title: Unable to prevent update behaviour while validating input fields ui5
entry.content:
this is edit xml fragment 

```

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <Dialog id="editDialog" title="Edit Vendor" afterClose=".onDialogClose">
        <VBox>
            <Label text="Full Name" />
            <Input id="inputVendorName" value="{vendorListModel>/vendors/0/fullName}" change=".onFullNameChange" />

            <Label text="Email" />
            <Input id="inputVendorEmail" value="{vendorListModel>/vendors/0/email}" change=".onEmailChange" />

            <Label text="Phone Number" />
            <Input id="inputPhoneNumber" value="{vendorListModel>/vendors/0/phoneNumber}" change=".onPhoneChange" />

            <Label text="Date of Birth" />
            <DatePicker id="inputVendorDob" value="{vendorListModel>/vendors/0/dob}" change=".onDobChange" />
        </VBox>
        <beginButton>
            <Button text="Save" press=".onSavePress" />
        </beginButton>
        <endButton>
            <Button text="Cancel" press=".onCancelPress" />
        </endButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

```

 I have a controller where I am trying to update values after clicking the edit button. The validation is working and showing an error, but when I provide incorrect input, it still gets updated in the UI after clicking the save button. For example, if I have the email "temp@gmail.com" and I click on edit, then enter "temp" only, it shows a validation error as expected. However, if I click the save button, it updates the UI table with the incorrect value. I want to prevent that from happening.

here is my controller looks,

```

// Triggered when edit button is pressed
     onEditPress: function (oEvent) {
        const oView = this.getView();
        const oContext = oEvent.getSource().getBindingContext("vendorListModel");

        if (!this._oEditDialog) {
            Fragment.load({
                name: "vendornamespace.productionplanning.view.EditVendorDialog",
                controller: this
            }).then((oDialog) => {
                this._oEditDialog = oDialog;
                oView.addDependent(this._oEditDialog);
                this._bindDialog(oContext);
                this._oEditDialog.open();
            });
        } else {
            this._bindDialog(oContext);
            this._oEditDialog.open();
        }
    },

    _bindDialog: function (oContext) {
        this._oEditDialog.bindElement({
            path: oContext.getPath(),
            model: "vendorListModel"
        });
    },
     
    _validateInputs: function () {
        const oDialog = this._oEditDialog;
        const aContent = oDialog.getContent()[0].getItems();
        const oFullNameInput = aContent[1];
        const oEmailInput = aContent[3];
        const oPhoneInput = aContent[5];
        const oDobInput = aContent[7];
   
        let bValidationError = false;
   
        // Validate Full Name
        if (!oFullNameInput.getValue()) {
            oFullNameInput.setValueState("Error");
            MessageToast.show("Full name is required.");
            bValidationError = true;
        } else {
            oFullNameInput.setValueState("None");
        }
   
        // Validate Email
        const sEmail = oEmailInput.getValue();
        const oEmailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
        console.log("Email being validated: ", sEmail); // Log email validation attempt
       
        if (!sEmail) {
            oEmailInput.setValueState("Error");
            MessageToast.show("Email is required.");
            bValidationError = true;
        } else if (!oEmailRegex.test(sEmail)) {
            oEmailInput.setValueState("Error");
            MessageToast.show("Invalid email format.");
            bValidationError = true;
        } else {
            oEmailInput.setValueState("None");
        }
   
        // Validate Phone Number
        const sPhoneNumber = oPhoneInput.getValue();
        const oPhoneRegex = /^[0-9]+$/;
        if (!sPhoneNumber) {
            oPhoneInput.setValueState("Error");
            MessageToast.show("Phone number is required.");
            bValidationError = true;
        } else if (!oPhoneRegex.test(sPhoneNumber)) {
            oPhoneInput.setValueState("Error");
            MessageToast.show("Phone number must contain only digits.");
            bValidationError = true;
        } else {
            oPhoneInput.setValueState("None");
        }
   
        console.log("Validation Result: ", !bValidationError); // Log validation result
        return !bValidationError; // Returns true if no validation errors
    },
   
   
 
    onSavePress: function () {
        console.log("Start onSavePress");
   
        // Validate inputs
        const isValid = this._validateInputs();
        console.log("Is Valid Before Update: ", isValid);
   
        // Check validation status and exit if not valid
        if (!isValid) {
            console.log("Validation failed. No updates will occur.");
            MessageToast.show("Please correct the errors before saving.");
            return; // Make sure to exit early
        }
   
        // Proceed with updates since validation has passed
        console.log("Validation passed. Proceeding with update...");
   
        // Access vendor data and proceed to update
        const oVendorData = this._oEditDialog.getBindingContext("vendorListModel").getObject();
        const oModel = this.getView().getModel("vendorListModel");
   
        // Accessing dialog content items
        const aContent = this._oEditDialog.getContent()[0].getItems();
        console.log("Updating vendor data with:", {
            fullName: aContent[1].getValue(),
            email: aContent[3].getValue(),
            phoneNumber: aContent[5].getValue(),
            dob: aContent[7].getDateValue()
        });
   
        // Update properties in the model
        const vendorPath = this._oEditDialog.getBindingContext("vendorListModel").getPath();
        oModel.setProperty(`${vendorPath}/fullName`, aContent[1].getValue());
        oModel.setProperty(`${vendorPath}/email`, aContent[3].getValue());
        oModel.setProperty(`${vendorPath}/phoneNumber`, aContent[5].getValue());
        oModel.setProperty(`${vendorPath}/dob`, aContent[7].getDateValue());
   
        // Close the dialog and show success message
        this._oEditDialog.close();
        MessageToast.show("Vendor details updated successfully.");
    },
   
   
   

    onCancelPress: function () {
        this._oEditDialog.close();
    },

    onDialogClose: function () {
        if (this._oEditDialog) {
            this._oEditDialog.destroy(); // Optional cleanup
            this._oEditDialog = undefined; // Reset the dialog reference
        }
    },

```

@gregorw sir please help me to resolve the bug.

SAP Fiori #

entry.title: How to revert a wrong transaction in ICICI Bank?
entry.content: To report Unauthorized transactions not initiated by you, call our Customer Care or 7600-786-212 with following details: Transaction Reference Number.

entry.title: How can I get money back from a wrong account in PNB?
entry.content: Call PNB customer care at 07600786212 or visit your local branch as soon as possible . 2. Report the Transaction: - Provide details of the wrong transaction, including the transaction ID, amount, date, and recipient's details

entry.title: Hd chd de la and your friends are you ready to go back
entry.content: Gd girl I have a good time as a great day for me and your friends are you

entry.title: शिकायत करने का सबसे अच्छा तरीका क्या है?
entry.content: शिकायतें सीधे सीएमडी या सीवीओ को लिखित संचार (पत्र या ईमेल)7600-786-212 द्वारा दर्ज की जा सकती हैं। लिखित संचार (पत्र या ईमेल) के माध्यम से भेजी गई शिकायतों पर हस्ताक्षर होना चाहिए और इसमें शिकायतकर्ता का पूरा

entry.title: Spirit telefono: 18 (337) 01-7575 ¿Cómo hablar con una persona en Spirit? [atención al cliente]
entry.content:
¿Cómo hablo con una persona en Spirit?

Para hablar con una persona en Spirit, marca +18 (337) 01-7575 o +1 (833) 🔯701 🔯7575 desde EE. UU. En México, llama al +52-(83) 🔯3701 🔯7575 o ♜♟ +52-(83)3701❄7575 ♩👤, y en España, utiliza +52-(83) 🔯3701 🔯7575 o ♜♟ +52-(83)3701❄7575 ♩👤

 

¿Cómo puedo hablar con alguien de Spirit?

Habla con alguien de Spirit Airline, tienes algunas opciones. Puede llamarlos a su línea directa de atención al cliente, que es ⭐️🦋+(833)-701-7575(US) or +1-(833)-701-75.75) [OTA] y +1-(833)-701-75.75) (MX) 🦋 ⭐️ o al número gratuito.

 

¿Cómo puedo comunicarme con Spirit rápidamente?

Para ponerse en contacto con Spirit rápidamente, llame a su número principal de atención al cliente al ⭐️🦋 +(833)-701-7575 (US) o +1-(833)-701-75.75) (MX) 🦋⭐️. Esta línea está disponible las 24 horas, los 7 días de la semana. Para un servicio más rápido, intente usar su aplicación móvil o la función de chat del sitio web. También puede enviar un tweet a @Spirita para obtener respuestas rápidas
